name: Salamangreat Recureance
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>転生炎獣の再起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サラマングレイト・リキュアランス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 2 "Salamangreat" monsters in your GY with different names; add them to your hand. If this Set card is destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Salamangreat" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, except "Salamangreat Recureance". You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Recureance" once per turn.
eff: Target 2 "Salamangreat" monsters in your GY with different names; add them to your hand. If this Set card is destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Salamangreat" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, except "Salamangreat Recureance". You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Recureance" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
